FMEDA.G: Standard failure mode
FMEDA.K:
memo
X - Violation of SG
O - No violation
FMEDA.P: Single Point Failure mode can violate the safety goal in the absense of safety mecahnism
FMEDA.S: Safety mechanism(s) (IC) allowing to prevent the violation of the safety goal
FMEDA.T: Safety mechanism(s) (System) allowing to prevent the violation of the safety goal
FMEDA.U: Failure mode coverage wrt. violation of safety goal
FMEDA.V:
Residual or Single Point Fault
failure rate
[FIT]
FMEDA.X:
Latent Failure mode can violate the safety goal in the absense 
of safety mecahnism
FMEDA.Y: Safety mechanism(s) (IC) to prevent latent faults
FMEDA.Z: Safety mechanism(s) (System) to prevent latent faults
FMEDA.AA:
Failure mode coverage wrt. 
Latent failures
FMEDA.AB:
Latent Multiple Point Fault
failure rate
[FIT]
